---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear, concise description of what's wrong.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen instead.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened (include error messages / screenshots if relevant).

## Environment
- Browser + version:
- OS:
- Node version (if running locally):
- Deployed URL or local?

## Additional context
Anything else that might help — logs, stack trace, related issues.
